properties.sql:
select
    video_url,
    true as enable_media_download,
    '../docs/tiktok' as tiktok_root,
    '../docs/tiktok/.env.tiktok' as env_file,
    'artifacts/tiktok/video_downloads' as download_out_dir,
    'artifacts/tiktok/video_downloads/tiktok_download_manifest.jsonl' as manifest_file,
    'artifacts/tiktok/video_download_manifest/data.parquet' as artifact_path
  from (
    values
      ('https://www.tiktok.com/@mychoicedesignstudio/video/7650018533669162260'),
      ('https://www.tiktok.com/@crystalkitchenandbedroom/video/7639630310463802646')
  ) as urls(video_url);

properties.code:
set -eu

workspace="${DUCKLE_WORKSPACE:-$PWD}"
input_path="${DUCKLE_INPUT_PATH:-}"

cd "$workspace"

if [ -z "$input_path" ] || [ ! -f "$input_path" ]; then
  echo "download_tiktok_video: DUCKLE_INPUT_PATH is required" >&2
  exit 1
fi

if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "download_tiktok_video: jq is required" >&2
  exit 1
fi

row_count=0
while IFS= read -r row_json || [ -n "$row_json" ]; do
  [ -n "$row_json" ] || continue

  video_url="$(printf '%s' "$row_json" | jq -r '.video_url // ""')"
  enable_media_download="$(printf '%s' "$row_json" | jq -r '.enable_media_download // false')"
  tiktok_root="$(printf '%s' "$row_json" | jq -r '.tiktok_root // "../docs/tiktok"')"
  env_file="$(printf '%s' "$row_json" | jq -r '.env_file // "../docs/tiktok/.env.tiktok"')"
  download_out_dir="$(printf '%s' "$row_json" | jq -r '.download_out_dir // "artifacts/tiktok/video_downloads"')"
  manifest_file="$(printf '%s' "$row_json" | jq -r '.manifest_file // "artifacts/tiktok/video_downloads/tiktok_download_manifest.jsonl"')"

  if [ -z "$video_url" ]; then
    echo "download_tiktok_video: skipped row with empty video_url" >&2
    continue
  fi

  mkdir -p "$download_out_dir" "$(dirname "$manifest_file")"

  export TIKTOK_ENV_FILE="$env_file"
  export TIKTOK_OUT_DIR="$download_out_dir"
  export TIKTOK_DOWNLOAD_OUT_DIR="$download_out_dir"
  export TIKTOK_DOWNLOAD_MANIFEST_FILE="$manifest_file"
  if [ "$enable_media_download" = "true" ] || [ "$enable_media_download" = "1" ]; then
    export ENABLE_MEDIA_DOWNLOAD="true"
  else
    export ENABLE_MEDIA_DOWNLOAD="false"
  fi

  bash "$tiktok_root/tiktok_download_video.sh" "$video_url"
  row_count=$((row_count + 1))
done < "$input_path"

if [ "$row_count" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "download_tiktok_video: no video_url rows were processed" >&2
  exit 1
fi

exit 0

properties.sql:
, raw as (
    select
      trim(coalesce(stdout, '')) as stdout_text,
      coalesce(stderr, '') as shell_stderr,
      try_cast(exit_code as integer) as shell_exit_code,
      try_cast(duration_ms as bigint) as shell_duration_ms
    from input
  ),
  lines as (
    select
      row_number() over () as result_row_number,
      trim(line) as stdout_json,
      shell_stderr,
      shell_exit_code,
      shell_duration_ms,
      false as synthetic_error
    from raw,
      unnest(string_split(stdout_text, chr(10))) as t(line)
    where trim(line) <> ''

    union all

    select
      1 as result_row_number,
      '' as stdout_json,
      shell_stderr,
      shell_exit_code,
      shell_duration_ms,
      true as synthetic_error
    from raw
    where stdout_text = ''
      and coalesce(shell_exit_code, -1) <> 0
  ),
  parsed as (
    select
      *,
      case
        when synthetic_error then null
        else try_cast(nullif(stdout_json, '') as json)
      end as payload
    from lines
  )
  select
    current_timestamp as checked_at,
    result_row_number,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.ok') as boolean), false) as download_ok,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.status') as download_status,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.download_enabled') as boolean), false) as download_enabled,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.video_url') as video_url,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.webpage_url') as webpage_url,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.video_id') as video_id,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.title') as title,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.uploader') as uploader,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.duration') as bigint) as duration_seconds,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.metadata_file') as metadata_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.media_file') as media_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.info_json_file') as info_json_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.run_dir') as run_dir,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.ytdlp_format') as ytdlp_format,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.selected_format_id') as selected_format_id,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.media_vcodec') as media_vcodec,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.media_acodec') as media_acodec,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.media_width') as bigint) as media_width,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.media_height') as bigint) as media_height,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.download_exit_code') as integer) as download_exit_code,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.download_stdout_file') as download_stdout_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.download_stderr_file') as download_stderr_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.stderr_preview') as stderr_preview,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.generated_at_epoch') as bigint) as generated_at_epoch,
    shell_exit_code,
    shell_duration_ms,
    payload is not null as parsed_ok,
    case
      when payload is null then 'parse_failed'
      when coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.ok') as boolean), false) then 'ok'
      else coalesce(json_extract_string(payload, '$.status'), 'download_failed')
    end as pipeline_status,
    stdout_json as raw_stdout,
    shell_stderr as raw_stderr
  from parsed

properties.code:
set -eu

duckdb_bin="${DUCKLE_DUCKDB_BIN:-duckdb}"

printf 'TikTok video download results:\n'
"$duckdb_bin" "$DUCKLE_DUCKDB_DATABASE" -c "
  select
    result_row_number,
    pipeline_status,
    video_id,
    media_file,
    selected_format_id,
    media_vcodec,
    media_acodec
  from \"$DUCKLE_INPUT_TABLE\"
  order by result_row_number;
"

exit 0
